name: Find The Lost Letter 3D
description: Somethings missing… can you find it? Help your dolphin friend rescue the lost letters and complete the words! Each word has a gap; just drag and drop the right letter from three choices to fill it in. No pressure, no mistakes, just pure underwater fun for kids and families! Dive through colorful ocean worlds, discover amazing sea creatures, and build your vocabulary one word at a time. The letters are waiting; go find them!
instructions: Mouse click or tap to play
